query:
SELECT id, name, location, priority, sector,
  LEFT(overview, 200) AS overview_snippet,
  LEFT(equipmentSignals, 300) AS equip_signals
FROM projects
WHERE (
  name LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR name LIKE '%sandblast%' OR name LIKE '%grit blast%'
  OR name LIKE '%blast and paint%' OR name LIKE '%blasting and paint%'
  OR name LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR name LIKE '%protective coating%'
  OR name LIKE '%corrosion remediation%' OR name LIKE '%coating remediation%'
  OR name LIKE '%shutdown maintenance%' OR name LIKE '%turnaround maintenance%'
  OR name LIKE '%asset integrity%'
  OR overview LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR overview LIKE '%sandblast%'
  OR overview LIKE '%grit blast%' OR overview LIKE '%blast and paint%'
  OR overview LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR overview LIKE '%protective coating%'
  OR overview LIKE '%corrosion remediation%' OR overview LIKE '%coating remediation%'
  OR overview LIKE '%shutdown maintenance%' OR overview LIKE '%turnaround maintenance%'
  OR overview LIKE '%asset integrity%'
  OR equipmentSignals LIKE '%abrasive blast%' OR equipmentSignals LIKE '%sandblast%'
  OR equipmentSignals LIKE '%surface preparation%' OR equipmentSignals LIKE '%protective coating%'
  OR equipmentSignals LIKE '%asset integrity%'
)
LIMIT 20;
